title: elymus borianus
intro: Elymus borianus, also known as Bor's wheat grass, is a species of grass within the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Elymus borianus is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Elymus borianus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
